title: Analytics - Device Release Notes Opened
scenario: Analytics events logged when viewing device-specific release notes in Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the mobile device.
Tap on the device name to open Device Settings.
Scroll down and tap on 'Release Notes' (or 'Firmware Release Notes') for the connected Poly Bluetooth audio device.
View the device-specific release notes content on the screen.
expected: Analytics events are logged when device-specific release notes are viewed. Event counts update after a few hours. Default analytics elements are present: graph, events in last 30 minutes, event count by country, event count by gender, events per session, app version, app build, and app environment.
